plugin.name: ThreeS_Mapper
plugin.author: Joakim
plugin.purpose: Always-on area mapper with click-to-walk (replaces mapper.tin)
plugin.description:
Maps wherever you walk, one map per named area, drawn in a draggable window. Click a room to walk there (step-confirmed BFS, like the chaos bot). Right-click a room = "I am here" (resync after teleports etc). Mapping auto-suspends while the area bot or chaos bot is driving.
Commands: mapper / mm status + help mm on | off tracking on/off mm area <name> switch to (or create) the map for an area mm list list known maps mm clear wipe the current map mm stop abort click-walking mm win show/hide the window

trigger.name: map_wall
trigger.match: ^You are unable to penetrate the wall that

muclient.script:
require "movewindow"
local CHAOS_ID = "5e6f7a8b9c0d1e2f3a4b5c6d" local STEPPER_ID = "1f2e3d4c5b6a798887766554" local MIP_ID = "9a8b3c5d1e2f4a6b8c0d2e4f"
local WIN = "mapper_" .. GetPluginID() local W, H = 340, 400 local CELL = 14 local windowinfo local visible = (GetVariable("visible") ~= "0") local tracking = (GetVariable("tracking") ~= "0")
local maps = {} -- maps[name][z][x][y] = { exits={}, short=... } local mapname = GetVariable("mapname") or "default" local pos = { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 } local lost = false local pending = {} -- moves awaiting their room line local pending_time = 0 local plan = nil -- click-walk: { dirs={}, idx=n } local links = {} -- links[mapA][mapB] = true (linked-area graph) local pending_enter = nil -- area declared by 'mm enter', consumed on next step local view_map = nil -- a linked map shown for reference (nil = your live map)
local DELTA = { n = {0,1,0}, s = {0,-1,0}, e = {1,0,0}, w = {-1,0,0}, u = {0,0,1}, d = {0,0,-1}, ne = {1,1,0}, nw = {-1,1,0}, se = {1,-1,0}, sw = {-1,-1,0}, north = {0,1,0}, south = {0,-1,0}, east = {1,0,0}, west = {-1,0,0}, up = {0,0,1}, down = {0,0,-1}, northeast = {1,1,0}, northwest = {-1,1,0}, southeast = {1,-1,0}, southwest = {-1,-1,0}, }
local function note(s) ColourNote("orange", "", "[map] " .. s) end
local function moved(p, dir) local d = DELTA[dir] if not d then return nil end return { x = p.x + d[1], y = p.y + d[2], z = p.z + d[3] } end
local function curmap() maps[mapname] = maps[mapname] or {} return maps[mapname] end
local function get_room(p) local m = curmap() local zt = m[p.z]; if not zt then return nil end local xt = zt[p.x]; if not xt then return nil end return xt[p.y] end
local function add_room(p, short) local m = curmap() m[p.z] = m[p.z] or {} m[p.z][p.x] = m[p.z][p.x] or {} local r = m[p.z][p.x][p.y] if not r then r = { exits = {} } m[p.z][p.x][p.y] = r end if short and short ~= "" then if r.short and r.short ~= short then r.exits = {} end -- different room moved in here r.short = short end return r end
local function room_count() local n = 0 for _, zt in pairs(curmap()) do for _, xt in pairs(zt) do for _ in pairs(xt) do n = n + 1 end end end return n end
local function add_link(a, b) if not a or not b or a == b then return end links[a] = links[a] or {}; links[a][b] = true links[b] = links[b] or {}; links[b][a] = true end
-- find a room with this short name in the current map (used to snap on re-entry) local function find_room_by_short(short) if not short or short == "" then return nil end for z, zt in pairs(curmap()) do for x, xt in pairs(zt) do for y, r in pairs(xt) do if r.short == short then return { x = x, y = y, z = z } end end end end return nil end
local function in_combat() local e = GetPluginVariable(MIP_ID, "enemy_name") return e ~= nil and e ~= "" end
local function bots_driving() if GetPluginVariable(CHAOS_ID, "cs_enabled") == "1" then return true end if GetPluginVariable(STEPPER_ID, "bot_active") == "1" then return true end return false end
-- ---------------- room line ---------------- local function parse_short(roominfo) local short = roominfo:match("^%s*(.-)%s*%(") or roominfo:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") local exits = {} local elist = roominfo:match("%((.*)%)") if elist then for e in elist:gmatch("[^,%s]+") do if DELTA[e] then exits[#exits + 1] = e end end end return short, exits end
function map_on_room(roominfo) if not tracking or bots_driving() then return end local short, exits = parse_short(roominfo) if #pending > 0 then local dir = table.remove(pending, 1) view_map = nil -- a real step snaps the view back to your area if pending_enter then -- we just stepped through a declared entrance into a linked area local newname = pending_enter pending_enter = nil add_link(mapname, newname) mapname = newname SetVariable("mapname", mapname) if room_count() == 0 then pos = { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 }; lost = false else local p = find_room_by_short(short) if p then pos = p; lost = false else pos = { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 }; lost = true end end else local p2 = moved(pos, dir) if p2 then pos = p2 end lost = false end else local cur = get_room(pos) if cur and cur.short == short then -- a look at the current room: fine elseif not cur and room_count() == 0 then -- first room of a fresh map else -- we moved without the mapper seeing it (teleport, follow...) if not lost then lost = true note("lost track of position - right-click your room on the map (or walk on)") end map_draw() return end end local r = add_room(pos, short) for _, e in ipairs(exits) do r.exits[e] = true end -- click-walk: next step after each confirm if plan then if plan.idx > #plan.dirs then plan = nil note("arrived") else local dir = plan.dirs[plan.idx] plan.idx = plan.idx + 1 pending[#pending + 1] = dir pending_time = os.time() Send(dir) end end map_draw() end
function map_blocked() if #pending > 0 then table.remove(pending, 1) if plan then plan = nil note("blocked - walk aborted") end end end
-- typed movement function OnPluginCommand(text) if tracking and not bots_driving() and not lost then for token in text:gmatch("[^;]+") do local t = token:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", ""):lower() if DELTA[t] then pending[#pending + 1] = t pending_time = os.time() end end end return true end
-- stale pending moves (commands that produced no room) get dropped function map_tick() if #pending > 0 and os.time() - pending_time > 8 then pending = {} if plan then plan = nil note("walk timed out") end end end
-- ---------------- click-to-walk ---------------- local function bfs(src, dst) if src.x == dst.x and src.y == dst.y and src.z == dst.z then return {} end local function key(p) return p.z .. "|" .. p.x .. "|" .. p.y end local came = { [key(src)] = { dir = false } } local queue, qi = { src }, 1 local found while queue[qi] do local cur = queue[qi]; qi = qi + 1 if cur.x == dst.x and cur.y == dst.y and cur.z == dst.z then found = cur break end local room = get_room(cur) if room then for dir in pairs(room.exits) do local nxt = moved(cur, dir) if nxt and get_room(nxt) and not came[key(nxt)] then came[key(nxt)] = { dir = dir, prev = cur } queue[#queue + 1] = nxt end end end if qi > 20000 then break end end if not found then return nil end local path = {} local node = came[key(found)] while node and node.dir do table.insert(path, 1, node.dir) node = came[key(node.prev)] end return path end
function map_click(flags, id) local z, x, y = id:match("^room_(%-?%d+)|(%-?%d+)|(%-?%d+)$") if not z then return end local target = { x = tonumber(x), y = tonumber(y), z = tonumber(z) } local rh = false if bit and bit.band then rh = bit.band(flags, 0x20) ~= 0 end if rh then pos = target lost = false pending = {} plan = nil note("position set") map_draw() return end if lost then note("position unknown - right-click your room first") return end if bots_driving() then note("a bot is driving - not walking") return end if in_combat() then note("in combat - not walking") return end local path = bfs(pos, target) if not path then note("no mapped path there") return end if #path == 0 then note("you are here") return end plan = { dirs = path, idx = 2 } pending[#pending + 1] = path[1] pending_time = os.time() note("walking " .. #path .. " rooms") Send(path[1]) end
-- ---------------- window ---------------- local function btn(id, x1, y1, x2, y2, label, active, tooltip) WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x707030 or 0x402818) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x90C040 or 0x604020) WindowText(WIN, "fb", label, x1 + math.floor((x2 - x1) / 2) - #label * 4, y1 + 3, 0, 0, active and 0x80FFFF or 0xE0C8A0) WindowAddHotspot(WIN, id, x1, y1, x2, y2, "", "", "map_button", "", "", tooltip or label, 1, 0) end
function map_button(flags, id) if id == "mp_power" then map_cmd(tracking and "off" or "on") return elseif id == "mp_clear" then map_cmd("clear") return elseif id == "mp_stop" then map_cmd("stop") return elseif id == "mp_hide" then visible = false SetVariable("visible", "0") WindowShow(WIN, false) return elseif id == "mp_export" then map_cmd("export") return elseif id == "lnk_me" then view_map = nil map_draw() return else local nm = id:match("^lnk_(.+)$") if nm then view_map = (nm == mapname) and nil or nm map_draw() end end end
function map_draw() if not visible then return end if not windowinfo then windowinfo = movewindow.install(WIN, 9, 0) end local shown = view_map or mapname local viewing = (shown ~= mapname) local m = maps[shown] or {} local cz = viewing and 0 or pos.z WindowCreate(WIN, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, W, H, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, 0x101418) WindowFont(WIN, "f", "Lucida Console", 9, false, false, false, false) WindowFont(WIN, "fb", "Lucida Console", 9, true, false, false, false) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, 0, 0, W, H, 0x604020) WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, 1, 1, W - 1, 17, 0x402818) WindowText(WIN, "fb", "Mapper: " .. shown:sub(1, 22), 8, 3, 0, 0, 0x40C0FF) movewindow.add_drag_handler(WIN, 0, 0, W, 17, miniwin.cursor_hand) -- status local st, sc if viewing then st, sc = "viewing (not your area)", 0xC0A040 elseif not tracking then st, sc = "OFF", 0x808080 elseif bots_driving() then st, sc = "suspended (bot driving)", 0x808080 elseif lost then st, sc = "LOST - right-click your room", 0x5050F0 elseif plan then st, sc = "WALKING...", 0x40C0FF else st, sc = "tracking", 0x60E060 end WindowText(WIN, "fb", st, 8, 21, 0, 0, sc) local rc = 0 for _, zt in pairs(m) do for _, xt in pairs(zt) do for _ in pairs(xt) do rc = rc + 1 end end end WindowText(WIN, "f", string.format("lvl %d %d rooms", cz, rc), 8, 35, 0, 0, 0x909090) btn("mp_power", 192, 21, 232, 39, tracking and "ON" or "OFF", tracking, "Mapping on/off") btn("mp_stop", 236, 21, 280, 39, "Stop", false, "Abort click-walking") btn("mp_clear", 192, 43, 246, 61, "Clear", false, "Wipe this map ('mm clear')") btn("mp_export", 250, 43, 300, 61, "Save", false, "Export all maps to 3s_maps.lua (shareable)") btn("mp_hide", 284, 21, 332, 39, "X", false, "Hide ('mm win' brings it back)") -- grid, centered on player (or on the entry when viewing another map) local gx, gy, gw, gh = 10, 68, 320, 282 WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, gx, gy, gx + gw, gy + gh, 0x080A0C) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, gx, gy, gx + gw, gy + gh, 0x604020) local cols, rows = math.floor(gw / CELL), math.floor(gh / CELL) local cenx = viewing and 0 or pos.x local ceny = viewing and 0 or pos.y local x0 = cenx - math.floor(cols / 2) local y0 = ceny + math.floor(rows / 2) local zt = m[cz] or {} for cx = 0, cols - 1 do for cy = 0, rows - 1 do local wx, wy = x0 + cx, y0 - cy local px, py = gx + cx * CELL, gy + cy * CELL local xt = zt[wx] local room = xt and xt[wy] if room then for dir in pairs(room.exits) do local d = DELTA[dir] if d and d[3] == 0 then local mx, my = px + CELL / 2, py + CELL / 2 WindowLine(WIN, mx, my, mx + d[1] * (CELL / 2), my - d[2] * (CELL / 2), 0x806040, 0, 1) end end WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, px + 3, py + 3, px + CELL - 3, py + CELL - 3, 0x806040) if room.exits.u or room.exits.up then WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, px + CELL - 6, py + 3, px + CELL - 4, py + 5, 0xD0A000) end if room.exits.d or room.exits.down then WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, px + CELL - 6, py + CELL - 5, px + CELL - 4, py + CELL - 3, 0x30C0F0) end if not viewing then local tip = (room.short or "?") .. " (" .. wx .. "," .. wy .. ")" WindowAddHotspot(WIN, "room_" .. cz .. "|" .. wx .. "|" .. wy, px + 1, py + 1, px + CELL - 1, py + CELL - 1, "", "", "map_click", "", "", tip .. " click: walk here right-click: I am here", 1, 0) end end if not viewing and wx == pos.x and wy == pos.y then WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, px + 4, py + 4, px + CELL - 4, py + CELL - 4, lost and 0x5050F0 or 0x60FF60) end end end -- linked areas row (click to view; "Me" returns to your live map) local ly = gy + gh + 6 local lk = {} if links[shown] then for k in pairs(links[shown]) do lk[#lk + 1] = k end table.sort(lk) end if #lk == 0 then WindowText(WIN, "f", "linked: none - 'mm enter <name>' at an entrance", gx, ly, 0, 0, 0x504540) else WindowText(WIN, "f", "go:", gx, ly, 0, 0, 0x808890) local bx = gx + 28 if viewing then btn("lnk_me", bx, ly - 3, bx + 32, ly + 13, "Me", false, "Back to your area") bx = bx + 38 end for _, nm in ipairs(lk) do local wb = math.max(30, #nm * 7 + 8) if bx + wb > gx + gw then break end btn("lnk_" .. nm, bx, ly - 3, bx + wb, ly + 13, nm:sub(1, 10), nm == shown, "View '" .. nm .. "'") bx = bx + wb + 4 end end WindowShow(WIN, true) end
-- ---------------- persistence ---------------- local function save_maps() local out = {} for mn, m in pairs(maps) do for z, zt in pairs(m) do for x, xt in pairs(zt) do for y, r in pairs(xt) do local ex = {} for d in pairs(r.exits) do ex[#ex + 1] = d end local short = (r.short or ""):gsub("[\t\n%z\1-\31]", " ") out[#out + 1] = mn .. "\t" .. z .. "\t" .. x .. "\t" .. y .. "\t" .. table.concat(ex, ",") .. "\t" .. short end end end end SetVariable("rooms", table.concat(out, "\n")) local lout = {} for a, t in pairs(links) do for b in pairs(t) do lout[#lout + 1] = a .. "\t" .. b end end SetVariable("links", table.concat(lout, "\n")) SetVariable("mapname", mapname) SetVariable("pos", pos.x .. "|" .. pos.y .. "|" .. pos.z) SetVariable("tracking", tracking and "1" or "0") SetVariable("visible", visible and "1" or "0") end
local function load_maps() local s = GetVariable("rooms") if s then for line in s:gmatch("[^\n]+") do local mn, z, x, y, ex, short = line:match("^(.-)\t(%-?%d+)\t(%-?%d+)\t(%-?%d+)\t(.-)\t(.*)$") if mn then local keep = mapname mapname = mn local r = add_room({ x = tonumber(x), y = tonumber(y), z = tonumber(z) }, short) for d in ex:gmatch("[^,]+") do r.exits[d] = true end mapname = keep end end end local ls = GetVariable("links") if ls then for line in ls:gmatch("[^\n]+") do local a, b = line:match("^(.-)\t(.*)$") if a and b then add_link(a, b) end end end local p = GetVariable("pos") if p then local x, y, z = p:match("^(%-?%d+)|(%-?%d+)|(%-?%d+)$") if x then pos = { x = tonumber(x), y = tonumber(y), z = tonumber(z) } end end end
-- ---------------- shared map file (3s_maps.lua) ---------------- local function map_file_path() return GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) .. "3s_maps.lua" end
-- write every map + the area links to a plain Lua file that can be committed/shared function map_export() local rooms, lnks = {}, {} for mn, m in pairs(maps) do for z, zt in pairs(m) do for x, xt in pairs(zt) do for y, r in pairs(xt) do local ex = {} for d in pairs(r.exits) do ex[#ex + 1] = d end local short = (r.short or ""):gsub("[\t\n%z\1-\31]", " ") rooms[#rooms + 1] = string.format(" %q,", mn .. "\t" .. z .. "\t" .. x .. "\t" .. y .. "\t" .. table.concat(ex, ",") .. "\t" .. short) end end end end for a, t in pairs(links) do for b in pairs(t) do lnks[#lnks + 1] = string.format(" %q,", a .. "\t" .. b) end end local f, err = io.open(map_file_path(), "w") if not f then note("export failed: " .. tostring(err)) return end f:write("-- 3Scapes shared maps - auto-loaded by ThreeS_Mapper. Generated; safe to commit/share.\n") f:write("maps_export = {\n rooms = {\n" .. table.concat(rooms, "\n") .. "\n },\n") f:write(" links = {\n" .. table.concat(lnks, "\n") .. "\n },\n}\n") f:close() note("exported " .. #rooms .. " rooms to 3s_maps.lua") end
-- load the shared file. Your own mapped areas stay authoritative; the file only -- fills areas you have no rooms for yet. Links always merge. Returns rooms added. function map_import() local path = map_file_path() local fh = io.open(path, "r"); if not fh then return nil end fh:close() maps_export = nil local ok, err = pcall(dofile, path) if not ok or type(maps_export) ~= "table" then note("could not read 3s_maps.lua: " .. tostring(err)); return nil end local skip = {} for mn, m in pairs(maps) do for _, zt in pairs(m) do for _, xt in pairs(zt) do for _ in pairs(xt) do skip[mn] = true end end end end local keep, added = mapname, 0 for _, line in ipairs(maps_export.rooms or {}) do local mn, z, x, y, ex, short = line:match("^(.-)\t(%-?%d+)\t(%-?%d+)\t(%-?%d+)\t(.-)\t(.*)$") if mn and not skip[mn] then mapname = mn local r = add_room({ x = tonumber(x), y = tonumber(y), z = tonumber(z) }, short) for d in ex:gmatch("[^,]+") do r.exits[d] = true end added = added + 1 end end mapname = keep for _, line in ipairs(maps_export.links or {}) do local a, b = line:match("^(.-)\t(.*)$"); if a and b then add_link(a, b) end end maps_export = nil return added end
function OnPluginSaveState() save_maps() if windowinfo then movewindow.save_state(WIN) end end
-- ---------------- commands ---------------- function map_cmd(args) args = (args or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") if args == "" then note(string.format("map '%s': %d rooms, %s%s", mapname, room_count(), tracking and "tracking" or "off", lost and ", LOST" or "")) Note(" mm on|off . area/enter <name> . list . clear . stop . win . export . import") elseif args == "on" then tracking = true SetVariable("tracking", "1") pending = {} lost = (room_count() > 0) -- has a map: must resync; fresh map: starts at 0,0 if room_count() == 0 then lost = false end note("mapping ON" .. (lost and " - right-click your room to sync" or "")) elseif args == "off" then tracking = false SetVariable("tracking", "0") plan = nil pending = {} note("mapping OFF") elseif args == "list" then local t = {} for mn in pairs(maps) do t[#t + 1] = mn end table.sort(t) note("maps: " .. (#t > 0 and table.concat(t, ", ") or "(none)")) elseif args == "clear" then maps[mapname] = {} pos = { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 } lost = false pending = {} plan = nil note("map '" .. mapname .. "' wiped - current room is now 0,0") elseif args == "stop" then plan = nil pending = {} note("walk aborted") elseif args == "win" then visible = not visible SetVariable("visible", visible and "1" or "0") if visible then map_draw() else WindowShow(WIN, false) end elseif args == "enter" then pending_enter = nil note("'mm enter' cancelled") elseif args == "export" then map_export() elseif args == "import" then local n = map_import() if n then note("imported " .. n .. " new rooms from 3s_maps.lua"); save_maps() else note("no 3s_maps.lua found - use 'mm export' to create one") end else local enter = args:match("^enter%s+(.+)$") local area = args:match("^area%s+(.+)$") if enter then pending_enter = enter:lower() view_map = nil note("will enter '" .. pending_enter .. "' on your next step - walk through the entrance now") elseif area then mapname = area:lower() SetVariable("mapname", mapname) pos = { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 } pending = {} plan = nil lost = (room_count() > 0) note("map '" .. mapname .. "' (" .. room_count() .. " rooms)" .. (lost and " - right-click your room to sync" or " - current room is 0,0")) else note("unknown command - 'mm' for help") end end map_draw() end
function OnPluginInstall() load_maps() map_import() -- shared baseline fills any areas you haven't mapped yourself AddTimer("map_tick", 0, 0, 5, "", timer_flag.Enabled + timer_flag.Replace, "map_tick") map_draw() end
function OnPluginEnable() map_draw() end function OnPluginDisable() WindowShow(WIN, false) end
